response.justification: Strong senior developer with broad full-stack experience, open-source contributions (GISCollective), Linux proficiency, and architectural exposure across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices. However, the role requires German at C1 level — candidate only has Basic German, which is a hard blocker for a client-facing leadership role in a German-speaking market. Also lacks explicit formal team leadership/management experience and Python is not listed in skills.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack and architecture experience across 15+ years including microservices, embedded, and DevOps
Strong open-source background (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial) and Linux/Unix proficiency aligned with digital sovereignty focus
Demonstrated mentoring/teaching ability through workshops, courses, and dojos (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, Web Internals)
concerns: German proficiency is only Basic — well below the required C1 threshold for client advisory work
No explicit Head-of-Development or formal team-lead role; experience is primarily IC/staff-engineer level
Python and UML expertise not evidenced in skills or project descriptions

key_factors.factor: Lack of formal leadership/management track record
